data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pass/fail determination per item, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is fully covered. While there is a scenario involving a forklift inspection that indicates a pass/fail outcome for one item (lights), it does not provide comprehensive evidence for all required checkpoints across multiple equipment types. This leads to a clear gap in validation as the evidence does not demonstrate the necessary coverage for the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of pass/fail determination for all required items across multiple equipment types.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add detailed inspection results for all equipment types
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide evidence of pass/fail determination for all required checkpoints across multiple equipment types.
